name: zk
description: Zachary's personal Claude Code skills — engineering disciplines invoked as zk:<skill>. Starts with tdd-ak (ak-flavored test-driven-development) plus a bundled, configurable Stop hook that enforces test-first.

mode.title: TDD gate mode
mode.description: How the test-first Stop hook behaves: off (never fires), nudge (blocks once per session, default), or block (blocks every stop until a test appears).

spike_branches.title: Spike branch patterns
spike_branches.description: Pipe-separated regex of branch prefixes where the gate is skipped (throwaway work).

ignore_globs.title: Ignore patterns
ignore_globs.description: Pipe-separated extended-regex of changed paths to ignore when deciding whether tests are missing.
